input: Generate a branded Word document for our technical proposal
expected_behavior: Skill activates, reads brand config, and produces a .docx with cover page (wordmark, title, tagline), branded section headers with primary-color underline, styled tables, and footer with year and confidential label

input: Create a Word document but we don't have a brand config file
expected_behavior: Skill activates with neutral defaults (blue palette, Calibri fonts), produces valid .docx, and notes that brand customization is available via config

input: Create a branded DOCX case study with dark cover page and data tables
expected_behavior: Skill activates with case study document type (dark cover, primary accent), generates branded data tables with alternating rows, and applies correct typography hierarchy

input: Generate a Word report with a 50-row data table that spans multiple pages
expected_behavior: Skill activates, splits table across pages with repeated header rows, maintains branded styling throughout, and handles page breaks gracefully

input: Create a branded landing page with responsive HTML and CSS
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate. This is an HTML generation request. Should route to brand-html skill instead.
